title: Bounded Bodies, JSON, Forms, Multipart Uploads, and Validation · Go Semantics Case: Maxbytesreader Contentlength
summary: A create endpoint trusts Content-Length, decodes one JSON value but ignores trailing data, accepts unknown fields, buffers uploads in memory, and reports internal parser errors to clients. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsgo maxbytesreader contentlength increment in bounded request decoding and validation pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use MaxBytesReader and server limits to bound actual body reads independently of absent, false, compressed, or chunked Content-Length.
Design shared and private caching, freshness, revalidation, no-store, stale behavior, invalidation, and Vary without exposing user-specific data.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
